# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;

class SmsService
{
    protected $client;
    protected $fromNumber;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->client = Http::baseUrl('https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01')->withBasicAuth(
            config('services.twilio.sid'),
            config('services.twilio.token')
        );
        $this->fromNumber = config('services.twilio.from_number');
    }

    public function send($to, $message)
    {
        return $this->client->post('/Accounts/{AccountSid}/Messages.json', [
            'To' => $to,
            'From' => $this->fromNumber,
            'Body' => $message
        ]);
    }
}
